name: Taoism

quotes.text: Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: A good traveler has no fixed plans and is not intent on arriving.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

modernReframes: You are exhausting yourself by trying to swim upstream against structural realities. Wu Wei is not passivity; it is finding the natural axis of momentum. Adjust your sails to align with the current instead of relying on raw fatigue.

The tech 'grind' glorifies unnecessary friction. If a project or career path feels like an endless uphill battle, step back. Find the path of least resistance where your natural skills compound effortlessly.
